titleStmt.title: SII 26.144: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 144. (A.R. No. 136 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Chōḷēśvara temple.

This inscription records the setting up of (an image of) Āḷuḍaiyār Nittaniṉrāḍuvār (i.e., Naṭarāja) in place of the old one, probably damaged during the war of the northerners, of the temple of Āḷuḍaiyār Vīrachōḷīśvaram-uḍaiyār at Koḻumum (i.e., Saṅgrāmanallūr) in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu, by a certain Āḷavandāṉ Aviṉāśi alias Kachchiyarāyaṉ. It also records his gift of lands, to provide for offerings to the same deity, at Kaḍaṟṟūr alias Irāsarāsanallūr in Karaivaḻināḍu, purchased for certain specified amounts of money, in āvaṇach-śrī-yakkipaḻañchalāgai coins.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kovirācakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī virarācentiratevarkkut tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellāniṉṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu 4 10 5vatu karaivaḻiṉāṭṭuk koḻumattu Āḷuṭaiyār vira
coḷiśvaramuṭaiyār koyililp paḻaiyanitta niṉṟāṭuvār vaṭukaṉ kalakattile cemanitappi Eḻuntaruḷukaiyil pimpu vaṭakūṟil perumāḷ puravariyāril Āḷavantāṉ Aviṉāciyāṉa kacciyarāyaneṉ Eḻuntaru
ḷuvitta Āḷuṭaiyār nittaniThe three letters t ta ni are written above line.ṉṟāṭuvāṟku Amutupaṭikku nāḷoṉṟukku Arici nānāḻikku viñcaṉa muṭpaṭa Oṉṟu muṉṟāka nāḷ Oṉṟukku nel kuṟuṇinānāḻikku ṉāṉ koṇṭuviṭṭa nilamāvatu karaivaḻināṭṭu kaṭaṟṟūrāṉa I
rācarāca nallūrilkāṇiyuṭaiya pāracivaril vimaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa Ulakuṭaiccoḻavācci ppakkal Āvaṇa c śrīyakkipaḻañcalākai Accup patiṉeḻum paṇa muṉṟukku Ikkacciyarāyaneṉ koṇṭuviṭṭa
nilam Ivvūril Āḷuṭaiyār koṅkaviṭaṅkiccaramuṭaiyār Aiṅkaiyā Ivaṉ Uvaccaṟkuṭi Āṟiṉāl vitai kalanemukkuṟuṇikku ṉāṉkellai yāḷuṭaiyār tirumarutuṭaiyāramutupaṭippuṟattukku meṟkut
teṉpāṟkellai peruvāykkālukku vaṭakku meṟpāThe sign for long is written below line.ṟkellai Ināyaṉār U rumāḷuṭaiyār tirumarutuṭaiyār tevatānattukkuk kiḻ A llai kārāṇmaikkāṇikkum puṟa pokkāṇi
kkum meṟku Ināṉke laikkuṭpaṭṭa nel vitai kalane mukkuṟuṇiyum meṟpaṭiyāṉpa coḻa nuvakku Āṇai yakcipaḻañcalākai Accuppatiṇaiñcukku ṉāṉ
taruvār
Digital edition of SII 26.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
